serverInfo.name: Tubask
serverInfo.description: YouTube MCP for Claude and Cursor — 3 read-only tools with MCP resources and prompts. Search, summarize, quote from captions, and multi-video creator advice (advice.themes). Responses include next_steps[], ai.usage, and structured error_code recovery.

tools.name: youtube_query
tools.title: YouTube Query
tools.description: Query YouTube: search videos/channels/playlists, channel profiles, latest uploads, playlist items, video comments, topic research with stats, or multi-video creator advice. Returns JSON including intent, result items, optional advice{} for goal=advice, next_steps[], and quota_cost. Single-video summaries and verbatim caption lookup use summarize_video and get_transcript.

ref.description: Universal paste target: watch URL, youtu.be link, @handle, channel URL, playlist URL/ID, or plain search text. With intent=auto, Tubask picks the mode.

goal.description: Shortcut for common jobs: advice (creator themes), latest (uploads), research (topic + stats), comments, playlist, info (one video), search (lightweight). Prefer over intent when unsure.

intent.description: Explicit routing mode when goal is insufficient. Most callers use goal or ref alone.

query.description: Search keywords for goal=research or goal=search (e.g. 'MCP server tutorial').

channel_ref.description: YouTube @handle or channel URL — for goal=advice, goal=latest, or channel_info.

video_ref.description: 11-char video ID or watch URL — for goal=comments or goal=info.

playlist_ref.description: Playlist URL or PL... ID — for goal=playlist.

max_results.description: Cap on videos, comments, or search hits returned (1–50). goal=advice analyzes up to 8.

page_token.description: Opaque token from next_page_token in a prior response — next page of same query.

exclude_shorts.description: When true, filters YouTube Shorts and uploads under ~3 min from latest/advice/research videos. Set false for Shorts-first or short-form research.

include_stats.description: When true, enriches video search/research with views, duration, URL, and is_short. Adds a small YouTube API quota cost on top of search.

order.description: Sort order for search/research. date = newest first; viewCount = most viewed; relevance = default keyword ranking.

comment_order.description: Comment sort: relevance (top/liked) or time (newest first).

include_replies.description: Include reply threads on comments (up to 5 per thread). false reduces payload size.

channel_id.description: Optional UC... channel ID to scope search/research to one channel.

include_full_description.description: Return full video/channel description instead of a 280-char excerpt.

depth.description: Detail for goal=advice and per-video analysis: brief ≈ 5 takeaways; detailed ≈ 12 takeaways and longer quotes.

topic_filter.description: For goal=advice: topic to find across a creator's catalog (e.g. 'pricing', 'kubernetes'). Searches the channel, not just recent titles.

published_after.description: ISO 8601 UTC datetime (2025-01-01T00:00:00Z) — limit research/search to newer uploads.

tools.name: summarize_video
tools.title: Summarize Video
tools.description: Summarize one YouTube video from captions and metadata. Returns JSON with summary, key_points[], chapters[], quotes[] (timestamped), coverage{} (transcript sampling), and next_steps[]. Requires captions (auto-generated counts). Multi-video creator synthesis uses youtube_query with goal=advice.

video_ref.description: YouTube watch URL, youtu.be link, or 11-character video ID.

depth.description: brief = concise takeaways; detailed = longer outline, more quotes and chapter detail.

include_timestamps.description: Include start/timestamp on quotes and optional transcript_segments[].

languages.description: Preferred caption language codes (en, fr, …). Falls back with language_fallback flagged.

tools.name: get_transcript
tools.title: Get Transcript
tools.description: Fetch YouTube captions for one video: full text, keyword search, time range, or paginated segments. Returns JSON with segments[] (display_timestamp, end_seconds), match_count when searching, language metadata, and next_steps[]. Structured overview of a video uses summarize_video.

video_ref.description: YouTube watch URL, youtu.be link, or 11-character video ID.

search_in_transcript.description: Case-insensitive keyword — returns only matching segments and match_count.

format.description: plain = joined text; timestamped = segments[] with display_timestamp for citations.

offset.description: Skip N segments after filters (pagination). Use next_offset from prior response.

limit.description: Max caption segments per page (hard cap 500).

start_seconds.description: Only segments overlapping this start time (seconds). Includes boundary overlap.

end_seconds.description: Only segments overlapping this end time (seconds).

languages.description: Preferred caption language codes. Response includes language and language_fallback.

resources.name: Tool routing guide
resources.description: Goal → tool mapping and disambiguation for the 3-tool surface.

resources.name: Response field reference
resources.description: advice{}, coverage{}, pagination, and ai.usage fields explained.

resources.name: Error recovery guide
resources.description: error_code values and next_steps for trial, quota, and caption failures.

resources.name: Persona workflows
resources.description: Researcher, journalist, creator, marketer, and developer call patterns.

resources.name: Upgrade paths
resources.description: Plans, when to mention Pro/Plus, objection handlers, billing URLs.

prompts.name: handle_any_link
prompts.description: Route a pasted YouTube URL, @handle, playlist, or search text.

prompts.name: creator_advice
prompts.description: Themed advice synthesized from a creator's videos (advice.themes).

prompts.name: latest_channel_video
prompts.description: Recent long-form uploads from a channel.

prompts.name: research_topic
prompts.description: Topic research with view counts and durations.

prompts.name: summarize_video_prompt
prompts.description: Structured summary with chapters, quotes, and coverage.

prompts.name: quote_for_article
prompts.description: Exact caption quote with timestamp for journalism.

prompts.name: triage_talk
prompts.description: Decide if a long video is worth watching (brief summary + coverage).

prompts.name: competitor_pulse
prompts.description: Channel profile and recent upload themes for marketers.
